EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A scan for files received from the ICAP server is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for a message received from the mail agent is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for files received from the API service is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for a file moved to the folder "{datafield2}" is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for a file received from the DPI module is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for a message received from the Checkme service is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
A scan for files received from user is finished with the result {object.state} on host {event_src.host}
